message:
fix: restore denormalized JSONL from bd export without data loss (GH#2479)

bd backup restore now handles JSONL produced by bd export, which embeds
labels, dependencies, and computed count fields directly in issue rows.
Extracts embedded data into proper relational tables. Also fixes init
guard allowing fresh clones with committed metadata.json (GH#2433).

Fixed test compilation error (GetDependencies returns []*Issue not
dependency records).

Fixes #2397, #2433

Co-Authored-By: paf0186 <paf0186@users.noreply.github.com>
